title: Random stuff I made
description: This is the random stuff i made. it has everything from normal swords to throwable moths.
body:
Hello! this is a mod that I have (slowly) made overtime so dont expect many updates but with that out of the way here are somethings this mod adds.

1: New tools, weapons and armor.

2: New plants and food.

3: New mobs.

4: some new crafting recipies.

Now you might be thinking "Why should I even download this mod"? And the answer is, this is some goofy mod I made with little to no knowlage about modding so the more updates happen the better the mod will improve. now I know that isn't much of a reason, but i dont have a better one so please download this mod and you may see better mods from me in the future.
